name: Caribou Pepper Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Caribou steak, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the shortening in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Dredge the Caribou steak in the flour and pepper mixture.
3. Brown the meat in the hot fat for 5-7 minutes on each side until cooked through.
4. Add the liquid from the tomatoes, water, onion, garlic powder, and beef bouillon cubes to the skillet. Stir to combine.
5. Bring the sauce to a simmer and cover the pan. Cook for 1 1/2 - 2 hours, stirring occasionally, until the meat is tender.
6. Uncover the skillet and stir in Worcestershire sauce. Add pepper strips and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Stir in the chopped tomatoes and cook until heated through.
8. Serve the Caribou Pepper Steak over hot cooked rice.
